title: CobblemonClean
description: This Pokemon Cleaner mod is an optimization and management tool for Cobblemon servers.
body:
🎯 Core Features

Automatically cleans up unattended wild Pokémon on the server to prevent excessive accumulation and maintain server performance.

🔧 How It Works

Scheduled Cleanup: Scans and removes eligible Pokémon at configured intervals.
Dimension Control: Toggle cleanup separately for the Overworld, Nether, End, and other dimensions.
Smart Protection: Multiple safeguards to prevent accidental removal of important Pokémon.
🛡️ Protection Mechanisms

Battle Protection: Pokémon actively in battle are never removed.
Ownership Protection: Pokémon owned by players (caught) are exempt.
Shiny Protection: Optional protection for shiny Pokémon.
Whitelist Protection: Specific Pokémon species can be whitelisted.
Status Protection: Pokémon evolving, busy, or being ridden are protected.
Leash Protection: Tethered Pokémon are not cleaned.
📢 Player Notification System

Countdown Warnings: Alerts sent 60 seconds and 30 seconds before cleanup.
Cleanup Results: Notifies players of how many Pokémon were removed after cleanup.
Manual Cleanup: Admins can trigger a full-dimensional cleanup at any time.
⚙️ Configuration Options

Enable/Disable: Toggle the cleanup functionality on or off.
Cleanup Interval: Set frequency in game ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
Max Clean per Cycle: Limit the number of Pokémon removed per cleanup cycle.
Dimension Control: Enable or disable cleanup per dimension.
Notification Settings: Customize warning times and display cleanup counts.
🎮 Use Cases

Server Optimization: Prevents server lag caused by excessive wild Pokémon.
Performance Management: Automatically clears unattended Pokémon to free up memory.
Admin Tool: Provides manual cleanup commands for easy server maintenance.
Player-Friendly: Keeps players informed through notifications.
🚫 Pokémon Exempt from Cleanup

Player-owned Pokémon.
Pokémon currently in battle.
Shiny Pokémon (optional).
Whitelisted Pokémon species.
Pokémon evolving or busy.
Pokémon being ridden or carrying passengers.
Tethered Pokémon.
This mod is an ideal tool for server administrators, effectively managing server performance while maintaining game balance to ensure a smooth experience for all players.![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dba4e9033c5e0660cf9ec2ffbbbe3527a9e63a7c.png)![中文](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4f273a6f4e92413520d1b8e45ebd6588cc2d715.png)
